visual_identity.ui_style: Retouch Modern / Assassin Terminal (Convenience Store Aesthetic)

antigravity_skill_orchestration.directives: Utilize 'antigravity-design-expert' to create a 'Store Aisle' grid layout. Use 'tailwind-patterns' for bold, impact-heavy headings. Direct 'performance-optimizer' to handle the high-speed motion lines in Suzuki's art without blurring.

generation_prompts.landing_page_ui: Build a 'Sakamoto Grocery' UI with Tailwind CSS 4.1. 1. HERO: A cinematic 'freeze-frame' action shot of Sakamoto in his apron holding a suppressed weapon. Use a 'Store CCTV' scanline overlay. Title 'SAKAMOTO DAYS' in massive red 'Archivo' font with a 90-degree slant. 2. CHAPTER GRID: Design cards styled as 'Product Labels' or 'Store Receipts'. Each card features a barcode, a price tag ($0.00 - Free), and the chapter thumbnail. 3. NAV: A yellow-and-black striped header (like hazard tape) with 'Inventory' (Chapters), 'Staff' (Characters), and 'Store Policy' (About) links.
generation_prompts.seo_geo_strategy: Activate 'seo-geo' and 'ai-seo' to target Japan, US, and France. Generate localized meta-tags for 'Read Sakamoto Days Manga Online' and 'The Order Assassin Rankings'. Inject 'ComicSeries' JSON-LD to secure the 'Read Now' button in Google Search results.
generation_prompts.technical_files: Generate a robots.txt (allow all), a dynamic sitemap.xml for 170+ chapters, and a .htaccess for extreme caching of action-heavy panels.

technical_architectures.image_workflow: Convert all Yuto Suzuki assets to AVIF via 'python-performance-optimization'. Implement 'Motion-Aware' lazy loading so high-speed combat panels remain crisp during fast scrolls.
technical_architectures.tag_integration: Inject G-ZP02TGLGPM tracking. Set up 'Kill-Count' events (tracking clicks on major fight chapters) to analyze which 'Order' members are most popular with readers.

interactive_elements: CCTV Flicker: Rare 0.1s 'Video Interference' glitch on the hero image.
Price Tag Hover: Chapter cards reveal a 'Sold Out' or 'On Sale' badge when hovered.
Bullet Hole Cursor: A custom cursor that leaves a temporary 'impact' spark on click.
Checkout Transition: Page transitions mimic a barcode scanner 'beep' and red laser flash.
